overview.intro_zh: 本网站服务于 F+P Group 的课程展示，用于清晰呈现前四学期的课程结构、课程路径与教学组织，同时便于学生理解课程安排，也支持其他学组查阅、对照与协同理解。
overview.intro_en: This website serves the F+P Group as a curriculum presentation platform, making the first four semesters' course structure, pathway, and teaching organization legible for students while also supporting reference and coordination across other academic groups.
overview.reading_zh: 网站以路径、逻辑、能力、矩阵和教学模型五个维度组织，既支持 F+P Group 对课程体系的整体展示，也帮助学生理解课程安排，并便于其他学组从结构、课程类型与学期安排等角度进行查阅。
overview.reading_en: The website is organized through pathway, logic, abilities, matrix, and teaching model views, supporting F+P's overall presentation of the curriculum, helping students understand course arrangements, and enabling cross-group consultation through structure, course type, and semester arrangement.

pathway.description_zh: 建立观察、感知、表达与研究方法的共同基础。
pathway.description_en: Build a shared basis in observation, perception, expression, and research methods.
knowledge_zh: 研究与表达的基础逻辑
knowledge_en: Foundational logics of research and representation
competence_zh: 将想法转化为清晰表达

pathway.description_zh: 在跨媒介训练中形成面向不同方向的衔接能力。
pathway.description_en: Form bridging capabilities across media as students move toward specialization.

pathway.description_zh: 在结构、实现、计算与协作中扩展综合能力。
pathway.description_en: Expand integrated capabilities in structure, realization, computation, and collaboration.
competence_zh: 在交互媒介中组织内容

pathway.description_zh: 将课程积累转化为项目展示、研究表达与实践输出。
pathway.description_en: Translate accumulated learning into project presentation, research articulation, and practice outcomes.
competence_zh: 将学习转化为实践能力

logicFlow.zh: 进入当代媒介与智能系统
logicFlow.en: Enter Contemporary Media and Intelligent Systems

domains.description_zh: 通过观察、记录、分析与论述建立问题意识和研究方法。
domains.description_en: Build problem awareness and research methods through observation, documentation, analysis, and articulation.

domains.description_zh: 通过图像、文本、版式与叙事形成清晰的设计表达能力。
domains.description_en: Develop clear design communication through image, text, composition, and narrative.

domains.description_zh: 通过材料、结构、工艺和原型建立设计实现能力。
domains.description_en: Build realization skills through material, structure, craft, and prototyping.

domains.description_zh: 以数字媒介、计算逻辑与交互原型进入当代系统协作。
domains.description_en: Enter contemporary system collaboration through digital media, computational logic, and interaction prototyping.

layers.name_zh: 层级 2：设计实现与数字媒介
layers.name_en: Layer 2: Design Realization and Digital Media

abilities.description_zh: 理解设计的历史、语境、方法与学科定位。
abilities.description_en: Understand the history, context, methods, and disciplinary positioning of design.

abilities.description_zh: 将观察、调研、分析与论证转化为设计判断。
abilities.description_en: Turn observation, inquiry, analysis, and argument into design judgment.

abilities.description_zh: 在静态与动态媒介中形成视觉叙事与信息组织能力。
abilities.description_en: Develop visual narrative and information organization across static and time-based media.

abilities.description_zh: 理解材料、结构与工艺，并完成原型制作与验证。
abilities.description_en: Understand material, structure, and craft while producing and testing prototypes.

abilities.description_zh: 掌握数字工具、规则系统与基础计算逻辑。
abilities.description_en: Gain fluency in digital tools, rule-based systems, and fundamental computational logic.

abilities.description_zh: 面向复杂媒介情境，形成交互原型与系统协作能力。
abilities.description_en: Develop interaction prototyping and system collaboration for complex media contexts.

teachingModel.description_zh: 通过共享知识框架建立共同问题意识与理论背景。
teachingModel.description_en: Establish a shared intellectual frame and theoretical background through common lectures.

teachingModel.description_zh: 在小组讨论中推进阅读、分析、批评与方法辨析。
teachingModel.description_en: Advance reading, analysis, critique, and methodological discussion in grouped seminars.

teachingModel.description_zh: 以动手实验和原型迭代连接概念与实现。
teachingModel.description_en: Connect concepts and realization through making, experimentation, and iterative prototyping.

teachingModel.description_zh: 通过公开展示整合研究过程、设计成果与反馈机制。
teachingModel.description_en: Integrate research process, design outcomes, and feedback through public presentation and exhibition.
